ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., NBA, FRA-1) */,
  "league_level" TEXT /* Level of the league (e.g., professional, semi-professional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Boston Celtics, LDLC ASVEL) */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Leagues table */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player (e.g., Point Guard, Power Forward) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-season combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Players table */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the player played (e.g., 88-89) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Teams table */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Total minutes played by the player in the season */,
  "points" REAL /* Total points scored by the player in the season */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Total rebounds by the player in the season */,
  "assists" REAL /* Total assists by the player in the season */,
  "steals" REAL /* Total steals by the player in the season */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Total blocks by the player in the season */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Total turnovers by the player in the season */,
  "fouls" REAL /* Total fouls by the player in the season */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player in the season */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage of the player in the season */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Player_Seasons table */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
